title: rubus saltivivus
intro: Rubus saltivivus is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, commonly referred to as the Himalayan raspberry or saltbush raspberry, which belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus saltivivus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Rubus saltivivus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
